name: Sophia Document
description: Routes inbound document attachments between native prompt context and LlamaParse before prompt build.

baseUrl.label: LlamaParse Base URL
baseUrl.help: Defaults to the US SaaS endpoint. Override for regional endpoints if needed.

tier.label: LlamaParse Tier
tier.help: Parsing tier used for inbound documents.

version.label: Parse Version
version.help: Use "latest" unless you need to pin behavior.

pollIntervalMs.label: Poll Interval (ms)
pollIntervalMs.help: How often parse job status is polled.

pollTimeoutMs.label: Poll Timeout (ms)
pollTimeoutMs.help: Maximum polling duration before giving up.

maxChars.label: Max Injected Characters
maxChars.help: Upper bound for markdown injected into system context.

forceLlamaParsePdf.label: Force LlamaParse for PDFs
forceLlamaParsePdf.help: Override the default PDF fallback behavior and always parse PDFs with LlamaParse.

alwaysParseExtensions.label: Always Parse Extensions
alwaysParseExtensions.help: Extensions that should always route through LlamaParse even if OpenClaw extracted text already exists.

fallbackParseExtensions.label: Fallback Parse Extensions
fallbackParseExtensions.help: Extensions that should only route through LlamaParse when the prompt lacks a usable matching <file> block.

alwaysParseMimeTypes.label: Always Parse MIME Types
alwaysParseMimeTypes.help: MIME types that should always route through LlamaParse when extension-based routing is unavailable.

fallbackParseMimeTypes.label: Fallback Parse MIME Types
fallbackParseMimeTypes.help: MIME types that should route through LlamaParse only when trusted extraction is missing or degraded.

supportedExtensions.label: Supported Extensions
supportedExtensions.help: Optional detection allowlist override. If unset, uses the union of always/fallback parse extensions.
